summary: Implement comprehensive monitoring with Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and Jaeger distributed tracing across all OpenPrint microservices

user_stories.i_want: real-time visibility into service health and performance metrics
user_stories.so_that: I can proactively detect and resolve issues before they impact users
acceptance_criteria: All services expose /metrics endpoint on port 9090
Metrics include request latency (p50, p95, p99)
Error rate metrics available per service and endpoint
Active connections gauge exposed
Dashboard shows overall system health at a glance

user_stories.i_want: automated alerts for critical system conditions
user_stories.so_that: I am notified immediately when services are degraded or down
acceptance_criteria: Alert fired when any service error rate exceeds 5% for 5 minutes
Alert fired when any service is unreachable for 2 minutes
Alert fired when job queue exceeds 1000 pending jobs
Alert fired when Redis connection pool is exhausted
Alert notifications sent via configurable channels (webhook, email)

user_stories.i_want: Grafana dashboards visualizing key performance indicators
user_stories.so_that: I can quickly understand system behavior and identify trends
acceptance_criteria: Service Health dashboard shows status of all 5 services
Request Throughput dashboard shows RPS per service
Database Performance dashboard shows query latency and connection pool usage
Redis Operations dashboard shows command rate, memory usage, and key statistics
Business KPIs dashboard shows jobs processed, documents stored, and active printers

user_stories.so_that: I can trace requests across service boundaries to debug issues
acceptance_criteria: All HTTP requests include trace context propagation
Spans created for database queries, Redis operations, and external HTTP calls
Jaeger UI accessible to view trace timelines
Trace sampling rate configurable via environment variable

user_stories.so_that: I can understand usage patterns and system utilization
acceptance_criteria: Counter for total print jobs processed (success/failure)
Counter for documents stored with size distribution
Gauge for currently registered printers and agents
Histogram for print job processing time
Counter for pages printed

user_stories.i_want: persistent metric storage and retention policies
user_stories.so_that: I can analyze historical trends and perform post-incident analysis
acceptance_criteria: Prometheus data persists across container restarts
15-second scrape interval configured
30-day retention policy for metrics
Configurable retention via environment variable

functional_requirements.title: Prometheus Client Integration
functional_requirements.description: Add prometheus/client_golang library to all Go services with standardized metrics collection

functional_requirements.title: HTTP Metrics Middleware
functional_requirements.description: Create middleware to automatically track request duration, status codes, and route labels for all HTTP endpoints

functional_requirements.title: Database Metrics Collector
functional_requirements.description: Instrument database operations with connection pool metrics, query duration histograms, and error counters

functional_requirements.title: Redis Metrics Collector
functional_requirements.description: Track Redis command execution, connection pool usage, and queue sizes for job and session storage

functional_requirements.title: Business Metrics Definition
functional_requirements.description: Define and expose business-specific metrics for jobs processed, documents stored, printer registrations, and active agents

functional_requirements.title: Metrics Endpoint Security
functional_requirements.description: Expose /metrics endpoint with optional authentication for production environments

functional_requirements.title: Grafana Dashboard Provisioning
functional_requirements.description: Create pre-configured dashboards via Grafana provisioning for all monitoring views

functional_requirements.title: Prometheus Alerting Rules
functional_requirements.description: Define alerting rules in Prometheus configuration for all critical conditions

functional_requirements.title: AlertManager Configuration
functional_requirements.description: Configure AlertManager with routing, inhibition, and notification receiver settings

functional_requirements.title: Docker Compose Monitoring Stack
functional_requirements.description: Add Prometheus, Grafana, AlertManager, and Jaeger services to docker-compose with persistent volumes

functional_requirements.title: Jaeger Distributed Tracing
functional_requirements.description: Integrate OpenTelemetry with Jaeger exporter for distributed tracing across all services

functional_requirements.title: Service Discovery Configuration
functional_requirements.description: Configure Prometheus to discover and scrape all OpenPrint services via Docker labels or static targets

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release Stations
functional_requirements.description: Users authenticate at printer via badge/PIN/mobile to release jobs, preventing sensitive documents from sitting unattended
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential enterprise feature, addresses data security compliance

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Apps (iOS/Android)
functional_requirements.description: Native mobile applications for print release, job status, queue management, and printer discovery
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Enables true mobile-first experience, supports hybrid work

functional_requirements.title: Cost Allocation & Quota Management
functional_requirements.description: Departmental chargeback, user quotas, budget tracking, and cost recovery features
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Enables enterprise cost control and ROI justification

functional_requirements.title: Print Policies Engine
functional_requirements.description: Configurable rules for color restrictions, duplex enforcement, page limits, time-based restrictions
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Reduces waste and enforces organizational standards

functional_requirements.title: Cross-Platform Desktop Client
functional_requirements.description: Native agent for Windows/Mac/Linux with universal driver support
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Reduces deployment complexity, improves user experience

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Metrics collection must not significantly impact service performance
non_functional_requirements.metric: Less than 5% CPU overhead and less than 10MB additional memory per service

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Metrics scrape operations should not interfere with service availability
non_functional_requirements.metric: /metrics endpoint must respond within 100ms for 10,000 metrics

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Metrics endpoints should be protected in production environments
non_functional_requirements.metric: Optional basic auth or network policy enforcement

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Monitoring stack must handle growing metric cardinality
non_functional_requirements.metric: Support up to 1 million unique time series

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Monitoring data should persist across monitoring stack restarts
Distributed tracing sampling should minimize overhead
Dashboard refresh rates should provide near real-time visibility

api_endpoints.description: Prometheus metrics exposition endpoint for all services
Prometheus query API for custom metric queries
AlertManager API for receiving and managing alerts

columns: recorded_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
fired_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL

risks.risk: High cardinality metrics could cause performance degradation in Prometheus
risks.mitigation: Label dimensions carefully, use low cardinality labels, implement metric relabeling rules

risks.risk: Monitoring stack disk space exhaustion from metric retention
risks.mitigation: Implement retention policies, monitor disk usage alerts, configure volume limits

risks.risk: Alert fatigue from too many or poorly tuned alerts
risks.mitigation: Start with critical alerts only, tune thresholds based on baseline metrics, implement alert grouping

risks.risk: Metrics collection overhead impacting service performance
risks.mitigation: Use efficient histogram buckets, implement metric sampling where appropriate, profile overhead

risks.risk: Distributed tracing overhead at high traffic volumes
risks.mitigation: Implement configurable sampling rates, use probabilistic sampling for production

risks.risk: Persistent volume data loss during deployment failures
risks.mitigation: Backup strategy for Prometheus data, use named volumes, implement disaster recovery procedures

implementation_phases.name: Shared Telemetry Infrastructure
tasks: Create internal/shared/telemetry/prometheus package with metric registry initialization
Add prometheus/client_golang dependency to go.mod
Create HTTP metrics middleware for request tracking
Create database metrics collector for sql.DB instrumentation
Create Redis metrics collector for go-redis instrumentation
Add unit tests for all telemetry components

implementation_phases.name: Service Metrics Integration
tasks: Integrate telemetry package into auth-service
Integrate telemetry package into registry-service
Integrate telemetry package into job-service
Integrate telemetry package into storage-service
Integrate telemetry package into notification-service
Define business-specific metrics for each service
Add /metrics endpoint to each service on port 9090
Verify metrics collection via curl

implementation_phases.name: Monitoring Stack Deployment
tasks: Add Prometheus service to docker-compose with persistent volume
Add AlertManager service to docker-compose
Add Grafana service to docker-compose with persistent volume
Configure Prometheus scrape targets for all services
Configure Prometheus data retention policy
Add environment variables for monitoring configuration

implementation_phases.name: Grafana Dashboards
tasks: Create Service Health dashboard configuration
Create Request Throughput dashboard configuration
Create Database Performance dashboard configuration
Create Redis Operations dashboard configuration
Create Business KPIs dashboard configuration
Set up Grafana provisioning for automatic dashboard loading
Configure Prometheus data source in Grafana

implementation_phases.name: Alerting Rules
tasks: Define high error rate alert (5% for 5 minutes)
Define service down alert (2 minutes unreachable)
Define queue backlog alert (1000+ pending jobs)
Define Redis connection exhaustion alert
Define disk space alert (80% used)
Configure AlertManager routing and receivers
Test alert firing and notification delivery

implementation_phases.name: Distributed Tracing
tasks: Add OpenTelemetry Go SDK dependencies
Create trace propagation middleware
Instrument database calls with spans
Instrument Redis operations with spans
Add Jaeger Docker service to docker-compose
Configure sampling rate via JAEGER_SAMPLER_PARAM env var
Verify trace export to Jaeger UI

implementation_phases.name: Documentation and Testing
tasks: Document metrics catalog with all metric names and labels
Create runbook for common alerts
Write integration tests for metrics collection
Performance test metrics overhead
Create backup/restore procedures for monitoring data
Update CLAUDE.md with monitoring endpoints and ports

key_gaps: No mobile application for end users to release prints or manage queues from mobile devices
Missing secure print release functionality (authentication at printer before printing)
No cost allocation, quota management, or chargeback features for departmental billing
Lacking print policies engine (color restrictions, duplex enforcement, size limits)
unique_selling_points: Open-source transparency and extensibility vs. proprietary competitors
Modern microservices architecture vs. legacy monolithic competitors
Cloud-native design from day one vs. competitors migrating from on-premises
Flexible deployment (self-hosted or cloud) vs. lock-in to specific platforms
Go-based high-performance services vs. Java/.NET legacy codebases
Modern React/TypeScript dashboard with superior UX
